notes:
This game will actually run the windows version with proton and perform significantly better then native (also looking slightly better). You need to install DotNet45 or above, and possibly set proton to win7 configuration. Without doing this the game will fail to launch. I found this to be a better option then running Native.
Also it may help to install protonfixes into your proton version (refer to github instructions).
title: BATTLETECH
